---
title: Width of the Hadley cell in simple and comprehensive general circulation models
pagetitle: 2007-9-1-Frierson2007b - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2007
author: Dargan M. W. Frierson, Jian Lu and Gang Chen
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 34, L18804, doi:10.1029/2007GL031115.
recommended_citation: 'Dargan M. W. Frierson, Jian Lu and Gang Chen, 2007: Width of
  the Hadley cell in simple and comprehensive general circulation models, <i>Geophysical
  Research Letters</i>, 34, L18804, doi:10.1029/2007GL031115.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2007GL031115
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Width of the Hadley cell in simple and comprehensive general circulation models

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2007*

**Recommended citation:** Dargan M. W. Frierson, Jian Lu and Gang Chen, 2007: Width of the Hadley cell in simple and comprehensive general circulation models, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 34, L18804, doi:10.1029/2007GL031115.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2007GL031115){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
